---
number-depth: 2
---

# Arduino IDE: Getting Started and How-tos

## Getting Started Guides

- [Getting Started with Arduino IDE 2](https://docs.arduino.cc/software/ide-v2/tutorials/getting-started-ide-v2/) - For installation and getting to know Arduino IDE v2.

- [Getting Started with stm32duino](https://github.com/stm32duino/Arduino_Core_STM32/wiki/Getting-Started) - Wiki page for setting up Arduino IDE for STM32 boards.

## Fix for STM32 Package Download Issues

Some users may face issues while downloading or installing the STM32 board package through the Arduino IDE Boards Manager.

In such cases, download the STM32 package folder from the link provided below and manually paste it into the following directory:

```text
C:\Users\<User name>\AppData\Local\Arduino15\staging\packages
```

[Download STM32 Package](https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1QDyCPPpoqEFpplnwpqDDi5zEr-J3ryzf?usp=drive_link){target="_blank"}

### Steps to Install the Package Manually

1. Download the ZIP file from the link above.

2. Extract the ZIP file using Windows Explorer or any archive extraction software such as 7-Zip or WinRAR.

3. Open File Explorer and navigate to:

   ```text
   C:\Users\<User name>\AppData\Local\Arduino15\staging\packages
   ```

   Replace `<User name>` with your Windows PC username.

4. Copy the extracted package files or folders into the `packages` directory.

::: {.callout-warning}
## Important

Do not replace or overwrite the existing `packages` folder with the downloaded folder. Existing files may be lost or corrupted.

Only copy the required extracted files/folders into the existing `packages` directory.
:::

5. Restart the Arduino IDE.

6. Open:

   ```text
   Tools → Board → STM32 Boards
   ```

7. Select the required STM32 board and continue development normally.
